text: Quick update: just wrapped the first close for [Halfway Capital Fund III](fund/halfway-capital-fund-iii) at $85M. Still targeting $150M final close by end of Q3—will share the LP breakdown at Wednesday's partner meeting.
Quick update on [Nexus Robotics](companies/nexus-robotics) — just got off a call with their CFO and the Q1 numbers look strong. Revenue up 40% QoQ, should have the full deck by EOD tomorrow.

Circling back on the Q1 portfolio review docs — [Amara](people/amara-okafor) mentioned wanting everything finalized by EOD Wednesday. Can someone confirm we have updated financials from [Stratos](companies/stratos) and [Beacon Health](companies/beacon-health)?
Ha, guilty as charged 😅 But seriously, that tiny coffee shop on Valencia with the pour-over bar? Changed my whole morning routine. Happy to share the spot if anyone wants to check it out!
Agreed on the timeline concerns. I'll circle back with [Amara](people/amara-okafor) after her board meeting tomorrow to align on next steps before we send the term sheet.

Ran the preliminary numbers on their Series A ask. [Amara Okafor](people/amara-okafor) wanted me to flag that their burn rate seems aggressive given current MRR—happy to walk through the model tomorrow if anyone wants a deeper dive.
Thanks for flagging this. I'll loop in [Marcus](user/marcus-chen) tomorrow to sort out the LP reporting timeline — let's make sure we're aligned before the quarterly call.
Okay who else is bringing their dog to the office tomorrow? Need to know if I should warn Cooper he's about to have the best day of his life 🐕
Agreed on the timeline concerns. I'd suggest we schedule a deeper dive with [Amara](people/amara-okafor) before the next partner meeting—she's been closest to their technical due diligence.

Circling back on this — I've reviewed the deck and I think [Nexus Robotics](company/nexus-robotics) is worth a deeper look. Their Series A metrics are solid and the founder has relevant domain experience. Let's slot them in for partner meeting next week.

Circling back on this — I'm comfortable with the terms as proposed. Let's plan to move forward with the term sheet this week and aim for a Thursday close if legal can turn things around.

Circling back on the [Axon Labs](companies/axon-labs) materials — their ARR growth is solid but I'm seeing some churn signals in the cohort data that we should dig into before the partner meeting Thursday.

Looping back on the [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) Q1 expense report - just got final numbers from accounting and we're 12% under budget. Will have the full breakdown ready for tomorrow's ops sync.
Haha okay fair, I'll admit defeat on the pineapple pizza debate. But I stand by my take on the coffee situation in the break room ☕

@marcus-reid can you pull the [Vesta Robotics](companies/vesta-robotics) deck and send it my way? Want to review before tomorrow's partner meeting.
@hannah-liu just pushed the updated wire instructions to the shared drive — let me know if you need me to walk through the format changes with treasury tomorrow

Circling back on this — I think we should prioritize the [Tempo Health](company/tempo-health) follow-on before end of quarter. Their Series B lead is getting antsy and we don't want to lose our pro rata.

Haha okay I'll admit defeat on this one — that documentary was way better than I expected. Still not convinced about the sequel though 😅
